title: Batch recall - Kelactin and PGF Veyx Forte
body: "We wish to inform wholesalers that Veyx-Pharma GmbH has initiated a Class II recall to wholesaler level with immediate effect for:   Kelactin 50 Microgram/ml Oral Solution for Dogs and Cats Vm 27569/4008 PGF Veyx Forte 0.250mg/ml Solution for Injection for Cattle and Pigs Vm 27569/4002   The reason for the recall is due to an increased risk of microbial contamination in the aseptically manufactured products at the site of the contracted manufacturer, in the period from 01/2024 to 05/2025.  This recall is for the following batches:     Product Batch number Expiry date     Kelactin 50 Microgam/ml Oral Solution for Dogs and Cats 24E027 05/2026     24I071 09/2026     24L044 12/2026   PGF Veyx Forte 0.250mg/ml Solution for Injection for Cattle and Pigs 24E015 05/2028     24G232 07/2028     24K021 11/2028     25E033 05/2029     Veyx-Pharma GmbH is contacting wholesalers to examine inventory immediately and quarantine products, subject to this recall.  For further information regarding the recall, please contact: qa@veyx.de or +49 5686 9986 0 "
